condition_description: Submitted VIN does not exist in master customer data.
message: VIN was not found in master customer data.

condition_description: No active warranty exists for the submitted VIN on the repair order date.
message: No active warranty was found for the repair order date.

rule_name: Mileage must be within warranty limit
condition_description: Vehicle mileage exceeds the applicable warranty mileage limit.
message: Vehicle mileage exceeds the applicable warranty mileage limit.
clause_reference_hint: Warranty time and mileage limit clause

rule_name: Repair code and causal part must match
condition_description: Submitted repair code is not valid for the submitted causal part.
message: Repair code does not match the submitted causal part.

condition_description: A prior claim exists for the same VIN, same repair code, and same causal part within 30 days.
message: A similar claim was found for the same VIN, repair code, and causal part within the duplicate-check window.
clause_reference_hint: Duplicate claim and prior repair review clause

condition_description: Claimed labor hours exceed the maximum labor time allowed without prior approval.
message: Claimed labor hours exceed the maximum allowed without prior approval.

rule_name: Excess parts cost requires prior approval
condition_description: Claimed parts cost exceeds the maximum parts cost allowed without prior approval.
message: Claimed parts cost exceeds the allowed threshold without prior approval.

rule_name: Repair order date cannot precede in-service date
condition_description: Repair order date is earlier than the recorded in-service date.
message: Repair order date cannot be earlier than the in-service date.
clause_reference_hint: In-service and repair date validation clause

condition_description: Repair order date is later than the warranty end date for the VIN mapping.
message: Repair order date is outside the applicable warranty period.

condition_description: Mileage is missing from the submitted claim.
message: Mileage is required before the claim can be evaluated.

condition_description: Repair code is missing from the submitted claim.
message: Repair code must be supplied for claim validation.

condition_description: Causal part is missing from the submitted claim.
message: Causal part must be supplied for claim validation.

condition_description: A required supporting attachment is missing for the submitted claim type.
message: A required attachment is missing for this claim.

condition_description: The repair operation requires a diagnostic report or trouble code, but it was not submitted.
message: Diagnostic evidence is required for this repair operation.

condition_description: The operation requires a photo under the configured component rule, but no photo was submitted.
message: A required photo attachment is missing for the selected operation.

condition_description: Prior approval is required for the submitted repair, but no approval reference was supplied.
message: Prior approval is required before this claim can be approved.

condition_description: Failure description or supporting evidence indicates racing use.
message: The claim is excluded because racing use was indicated.

condition_description: Failure description or evidence indicates abuse or operational damage.
message: The claim is excluded because abuse or operational damage was indicated.

condition_description: Evidence indicates an unauthorized modification contributed to the failure.
message: The claim is excluded because an unauthorized modification was identified.

condition_description: The failure was caused by collision or external impact damage.
message: The claim is excluded because collision damage caused the failure.

condition_description: Contaminated or incorrect fluids caused the claimed failure.
message: The claim is excluded because contaminated or incorrect fluids caused the failure.

condition_description: The claimed component is a wear item and no defect-specific condition was established.
message: The claim is not warrantable because it reflects normal wear.

condition_description: The claim exceeds the mileage limit by no more than 10 percent and no exclusion applies.
message: The claim may be eligible for goodwill review on mileage only.

condition_description: The claim exceeds the time limit by no more than the configured goodwill window and no exclusion applies.
message: The claim may be eligible for goodwill review on time only.

condition_description: The AI adjudication confidence is below the configured threshold for autonomous approval.
message: AI confidence is below the threshold; human review is required.

condition_description: The total claim amount materially exceeds the expected rule threshold for the selected operation.
message: The total claim amount is unusually high and requires review.

condition_description: One or more submitted dates are not in valid YYYY-MM-DD format.
message: Submitted date values are not in a valid format.

condition_description: Claimed cost or labor values cannot be negative.
message: Cost and labor values must be zero or greater.

condition_description: The submitted claim ID already exists in the claim store or prior repair history.
message: Claim ID already exists and cannot be reused.

condition_description: Submitted VIN does not match the expected VIN format.
message: VIN format is invalid.

condition_description: A related prior repair exists on the same VIN and component group but with a different causal part.
message: A related prior repair was found and should be considered during adjudication.

condition_description: The same causal part has a prior repair on the same VIN within 12 months but outside the duplicate window.
message: The same causal part was repaired previously within 12 months and requires repeat-repair review.

rule_name: Component must be covered by mapped warranty
condition_description: The submitted repair operation is not covered by the applicable mapped warranty product.
message: The selected repair is not covered under the mapped warranty.

rule_name: Labor and cost rule must exist
condition_description: No labor and cost rule exists for the submitted repair code and warranty combination.
message: No deterministic labor and cost rule was found for this operation.
